X0700B_CRCTN_DSCHRG_DT X0700B Correction Discharge Date CHAR 8 The data in this column contains the event date for the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. The event date is the discharge date for a discharge record. effective 10/01/2023
617 X0700C_CRCTN_ENTRY_DT X0700C_CRCTN_ENTRY_DT X0700C Correction Entry Date CHAR 8 The data in this column contains the event date for the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. The event date is the entry date for an entry
